metadata.description: Performance comparison across pf branches. One run object per branch/commit. Append-only; never edit past runs.
metadata.traffic: udpflood raw AF_PACKET injector, 1000B frames, single 5-tuple

runs.description: baseline: cBPF, single RX queue, no fanout
runs.notes: veth 8-core host; pf pinned 1 core @100% (27usr/73sys); zero-loss; sender also ~547k cap

runs.description: PACKET_FANOUT_HASH: 8 RX queues + 8 TX rings, each goroutine pinned to distinct CPU
runs.notes: 8 RX + 8 TX rings, one per queue; 8 udpflood workers distinct src_port; kernel_drops=0 across 30M+ packets; zero-loss; 2.3x baseline pps

runs.description: sync.Pool for BlockCursor and dump payload buffers
runs.notes: BlockCursor pooled per-block; payload bufs pooled in Tap/DumpServer; kernel_drops=0; throughput same as fanout - pool reduces GC latency not raw pps on no-filter bench
